title: MVP HR Management Web App
desc:
I’m building a minimum-viable HR Management System that runs in the browser and must be ready within 10–15 days under a fixed ₹10,000 budget. The scope is intentionally lean but each module must work end-to-end with a clean, well-structured codebase I can extend later.

Core functionality I need:
• Employee records: add, edit, delete, view  
• Attendance tracking  
• Leave requests and approvals  
• Salary & payroll processing  
• Single admin login (username + password) with its own dashboard  
• Responsive interface in a polished, corporate style  

What I expect on hand-over:
• Full source code and a database backup  
• Straightforward setup/read-me so I can deploy quickly  

Please tell me:
1. The tech stack you propose (frameworks, DB, any UI libraries).  
2. How you will divide the 10–15-day schedule.  
3. Links or screenshots of similar HR or dashboard projects you’ve completed.

Clean architecture, well-named tables and controllers, and concise documentation are more important to me than fancy extras. Let me know if anything in the brief is unclear and I’ll respond quickly.

title: Cyclone and autocad are very important -- 2
desc:
These are the project requirements:

I have a four-storey, 4,000 sq ft historic townhouse that was recently scanned using a Leica BLK unit. The point-cloud files are already packaged as *.blk, so you'll need Cyclone (to register and slice the point cloud) and AutoCAD to create the drawings. Without both, you won't be able to work with the data.

**Scope**

* Draft one accurate, dimensioned layout for each floor (Ground through Fourth) based on the point cloud.
* Show existing framing and wall locations, door and room openings, and pay particular attention to the position and size of every window.
* No structural details beyond framing lines and no MEP. This is strictly a basic layout with dimensions.

**Deliverables**

* Four DWG files, one for each level, with clean and properly organized layers.
* One collated PDF set that mirrors the DWG sheets.

**Acceptance Criteria**

* Key dimensions must be within ±¼ in of the point-cloud data.
* All windows must be clearly tagged and dimensioned.
* DWG files should open without errors in AutoCAD 2020 or later and print to scale at ¼″ = 1′-0″.

title: Draft Investigation Letters on Illegal Landfill
desc:
I need three carefully-researched letters that lay out the facts of an unpermitted landfill measuring close to five-million cubic feet. The objective is to spur a formal investigation, so each letter must be precise, fully referenced, and written in a calm, neutral tone that still underscores the seriousness of the environmental and public-health risks.

The addressees are the Environmental Protection Agency (EPA), the Department of Justice (DOJ), and the appropriate local and state officials. While the core data will be consistent, each version should reflect the mandate and jurisdiction of its specific agency, citing the most relevant federal or state statutes, regulations, and past enforcement actions.

To help you get started I will supply location details, photographs, limited monitoring data, and a timeline of complaints already filed. You will need to augment this with publicly available records—permit databases, state solid-waste codes, EPA guidance documents, and any comparable case precedents—to build a factual narrative that clearly justifies immediate agency action.

Deliverables  
• Letter to the EPA, formatted for the Office of Enforcement and Compliance Assurance  
• Letter to the DOJ’s Environmental Crimes Section, highlighting potential criminal violations  
• Letter to state and county regulators that aligns with their permitting authority  
• A brief reference sheet listing every source, statute, or report cited

Acceptance criteria  
• Tone remains fact-ba

title: Cell Structure Function Analysis
desc:
I am running a biological-research project that zeroes in on the architecture of the cell and how that architecture drives function. The work revolves around detailed examination of cell structure—organelles, membranes, cytoskeleton—so that we can map what we see under the microscope to the roles each compartment actually plays.

The raw material for the study will be high-resolution images (confocal, TEM or similar), relevant literature references I supply, and any quantitative assays you may suggest to back up the visual observations. From those inputs, I need:

• A clear, well-annotated image set that highlights each major structural element we discuss  
• A concise data table (or spreadsheet) quantifying size, density or spatial distribution metrics where possible  
• A written report (2-3 pages is fine) that links each observed structural feature to its suspected or confirmed cellular function, referencing current literature for support

Deliverables are complete once the images are annotated, the data table passes a quick reproducibility check (I will re-run one sample analysis), and the report reads clearly without gaps between the observations and functional interpretations.

Preferred tools include ImageJ/Fiji for image processing, GraphPad or Excel for basic stats, and any standard reference manager for citations—feel free to propose alternatives if they streamline the workflow.

title: Phone-Based Customer Support
desc:
I’m looking for a reliable specialist who can take charge of our phone line and give every caller a smooth, professional experience. Your main focus will be to resolve issues quickly so customers end each call feeling heard and helped.

What you’ll do
• Answer inbound calls during our business hours (we’ll provide a VoIP number).  
• Listen actively, identify the root of each problem, and deliver clear, concise solutions or next steps on the spot whenever possible.  
• Log every interaction in our CRM with call notes, follow-up actions, and resolution time.  
• Escalate only the cases that truly require higher-level intervention.

What I’ll supply
• A concise knowledge-base and onboarding guide.  
• Access to the CRM, call script templates, and a support Slack channel for quick questions.

Ideal background
• Previous phone support experience.  
• Confident, friendly phone demeanor with fluent spoken English.  
• Ability to troubleshoot common product questions and think on your feet.

Success looks like
• High first-call resolution rate.  
• Consistently positive customer feedback.  
• Accurate, timely call logs.

If you’re ready to become the calm, capable voice our customers trust, I’d love to hear about your experience and current availability.

title: I Need Beeting Platform like http://word777.now Ready To Use , IF you Dont Have a Platform then dont bid
desc:
**Project Title:** Betting Platform Development (Similar to Word777)

**Project Description:**

I am looking for an experienced full-stack developer or development team to build a betting platform similar in functionality and user experience to an existing betting website (reference will be shared privately).

**Project Requirements:**

* Modern, responsive UI for desktop and mobile.
* Secure user registration and login system.
* User wallet with deposit and withdrawal management.
* Betting functionality with real-time odds and live updates.
* Admin panel to manage users, transactions, betting markets, and reports.
* User dashboard with betting history, transaction history, and account management.
* Secure payment gateway integration (as per supported regions).
* Notifications and activity logs.
* High performance, scalability, and strong security practices.
* Clean, well-documented source code.

**Developer Requirements:**

* Proven experience building large-scale web applications.
* Strong knowledge of frontend and backend technologies.
* Experience with database design, API development, and security best practices.
* Ability to provide ongoing maintenance and support after deployment.

**When Applying, Please Include:**

* Portfolio of similar projects (if available).
* Tech stack you recommend.
* Estimated timeline.
* Estimated budget.
* Whether you can provide post-launch support.

**Note:** Please share only relevant experience and examples of similar platforms you have

title: PDF to Excel Word Data Transfer
desc:
I have a collection of PDFs and scanned images that need to be converted into clean, well-structured files in both Excel and Word. Every piece of information must be lifted exactly as it appears, without spelling or formatting slips, and then grouped by clear categories so the final sheets are easy to navigate.

Here’s what the job involves:
• Carefully read each source file, transpose the contents into Excel tables and mirrored Word documents, and double-check that figures, punctuation, and spacing match the originals.
• Keep the new files organised by category names I’ll supply up front, using separate tabs or headings where appropriate.
• Perform your own quality review before handing the work back so I don’t have to hunt for errors.

I’ll share the PDFs/images once we start; the volume isn’t huge but accuracy is critical. If you type quickly, know your way around Microsoft Excel and Word shortcuts, and have a sharp eye for detail, this should be straightforward.

Deliverables:
1. One Excel workbook with data arranged by the agreed categories.
2. One Word document (or a set, if the volume is high) mirroring the same structure.
3. A brief note confirming you’ve verified spelling, numbers, and formatting.

If you can turn this around promptly while maintaining top-tier accuracy, let’s get started.

title: Legal Framework for Indian FinTech SaaS
desc:
Project Title

Legal Documentation & Governance Framework for an Indian FinTech / Chit Fund SaaS Platform

Project Description

We are building ChitFund Portal, a next-generation SaaS platform for licensed chit fund operations in India. The platform digitizes subscriber onboarding, foreman management, scheme management, auctions, collections, reporting, compliance workflows, digital identity, and trust services.

We are looking for an experienced Legal Consultant / Advocate / Legal Documentation Specialist to help build a comprehensive legal, governance, and compliance documentation framework for the platform.

 We are looking for someone who can help establish the legal and governance foundation of a large-scale financial technology platform.

⸻

About the Platform

The platform includes:

* Licensed Foreman Management
* Subscriber Management
* Chit Scheme Management
* Digital Auctions
* Payment Integration
* Compliance Automation
* Digital Identity (Platform-issued IDs)
* Reporting & Audit
* Registrar-ready documentation
* API-based verification services
* AI-powered compliance modules (future)

⸻

Scope of Work

The selected professional will work on preparing and reviewing:

Governance Documentation

* Constitution & Charter
* Corporate Governance Framework
* Board Policies
* Governance Policies
* Risk Management Framework
* Internal Control Framework

Legal Documentation

* Terms of Service
* Privacy Policy
* Cookie Policy
* Disclaimer
* Acceptable Use Policy
* User Agre

title: Desain Poster Kampanye Sosial
desc:
Saya membutuhkan seorang desainer grafis yang dapat membuat satu poster kreatif untuk sebuah kampanye sosial. Pesan inti kampanye sudah saya siapkan; Anda tinggal menerjemahkannya ke dalam visual yang menarik dan mudah dipahami audiens luas.

Ruang lingkup pekerjaan:
• Mengonsep layout, warna, dan tipografi yang selaras dengan tema kampanye sosial.  
• Menyajikan satu versi konsep awal untuk saya tinjau, lalu merevisi hingga final sesuai masukan.  
• Menyerahkan file akhir dalam format siap cetak (PDF/300 dpi, CMYK) serta file sumber yang dapat diedit (AI atau PSD).

Kriteria keberhasilan:
• Visual komunikatif, kuat secara emosional, dan konsisten dengan pesan kampanye.  
• Teks jelas terbaca pada ukuran poster standar A3.  
• Warna dan elemen grafis tetap tajam saat dicetak.

Silakan lampirkan portofolio poster atau proyek sejenis agar saya dapat menilai gaya desain Anda. Saya menantikan kolaborasi yang lancar dan hasil yang berdampak positif!

title: Kumpulan Artikel Hiburan Harian
desc:
Saya ingin menerima kumpulan artikel berita hiburan setiap hari agar saya bisa membacanya tanpa harus mencari satu-satu di internet. Berikut yang saya butuhkan:

• 5–7 artikel terbaru seputar film, musik, selebritas, atau budaya pop, dikurasi dari sumber tepercaya.  
• Tautan asli tiap artikel plus ringkasan singkat (2–3 kalimat) dalam Bahasa Indonesia.  
• Dokumen harian dalam Google Docs atau file PDF—mana yang paling praktis.  
• Pengiriman sebelum pukul 09.00 WIB setiap hari kerja.

Pastikan berita tidak mengandung clickbait berlebihan dan berasal dari media resmi atau portal hiburan ternama. Jika ada kabar penting di luar jadwal, saya terbuka menerima pemberitahuan tambahan.

title: Jewellery Manufacturing ERP Development
desc:
I'm seeking an experienced developer to create a comprehensive Jewellery Manufacturing ERP system using Microsoft Access and Excel. The ERP should effectively manage order tracking and employee assignment, and feature a CAD to Dispatch workflow, dashboards, reports, job cards, inventory management, and VBA automation. It should also support QR/barcode integration and be designed to scale for over 100,000 orders.

Key Requirements:

Order Tracking Module (Prioritized):
- Real-time status updates
- Automated notifications
- Historical order logs

Employee Assignment Module (Prioritized):
- Task scheduling
- Performance tracking
- Role-based assignments

Additional Features:
- CAD to Dispatch workflow
- Dashboards and reports for data visualization
- Job cards and inventory management
- VBA automation for streamlined processes
- QR/barcode support

Ideal Skills and Experience:
- Proficiency in Microsoft Access and Excel
- Strong background in ERP development, particularly in a manufacturing context
- Experience with VBA automation
- Familiarity with QR/barcode integration
- Ability to design scalable systems for high-volume order management

Please provide samples of previous ERP projects, particularly in manufacturing, with your bids.

Details of project 
Build a Jewellery Manufacturing ERP using Microsoft Access + Excel with order tracking, CAD to Dispatch workflow, dashboards, reports, job cards, inventory, employee assignment, VBA automation, QR/barcode support, and scalable

title: Deploy Spring Boot Middleware Server
desc:
I already have a Windows-based .exe that simply wraps a Spring Boot jar; that jar contains virtually all of the middleware logic connecting my local system with an external service. What I need now is a developer who can transform that single-file setup into a fully-fledged, scalable server running in the cloud.
Point to me note - i want that spring boot server working as it is same no chnages only chances main sevrer inside it and make sure jar works with that server same to same as they work with orignal ones
You’ll receive:  
• the original Spring Boot jar (inside the exe)  
• my full assistance and domain knowledge whenever you need it

Scope  
1. Unpack or otherwise extract the jar so the project can be built, tested and version-controlled normally.  
2. Refactor or re-organise the codebase only where strictly required to run as a proper microservice.  
3. Deploy the service to a cloud environment—my preference is Bigrock, yet I’m happy to hear your advice on using their cloud instances or an equivalent provider.  
4. Make sure the middleware takes care of data processing, authentication & authorisation, and works as an API gateway exactly as it does now, but exposed through secure HTTPS endpoints.  
5. Set up CI/CD so future updates are as simple as pushing to the repo.

Deliverables  
• Compilable Spring Boot project (Gradle or Maven) in a Git repo  
• Cloud deployment (container image or VM) reachable at a public URL  
• Documentation covering build steps, environment

title: Punjabi-English Display Home Tour Editing
desc:
I shoot raw walk-throughs of new display homes around Melbourne—both double and single storey—and I narrate entirely in Punjabi. I need those recordings shaped into engaging, dynamic YouTube content with English captions so viewers catch every detail even if they don’t speak Punjabi.

Here’s what I’m after each time I drop footage in your folder:  

• 1–2 full-length YouTube videos (usually 8–15 min) edited for an energetic pace: smooth, subtle transitions, logical cuts, light colour correction and balanced audio.  
• 3 vertical reels cut from the same material, ready for Instagram Reels and YouTube Shorts (under 60 s each, punchy hooks up front, captions burned-in).  
• Captions in perfect sync: Punjabi dialogue translated on-screen in clear, readable English. I will provide spellings for any tricky real-estate terms if needed.  
• A turnaround of 24 hours from the time I upload files to Google Drive or Dropbox.

You’re free to work in Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, DaVinci Resolve or another pro-grade NLE—as long as the final exports arrive in 4K (main video) and 1080 × 1920 (reels) H.264, ready to upload.

I’ll know the job is done when:  
– All videos play smoothly with no jarring cuts;  
– English captions match the spoken Punjabi;  
– Transitions feel polished yet subtle;  
– Reels keep viewers hooked within the first three seconds.

If this workflow fits your skill set and you’re comfortable handling Punjabi audio, I’m ready to start sending footage right away.

title: Desain Poster Lowongan Kerja
desc:
Saya membutuhkan sebuah poster A4 untuk mengiklankan lowongan kerja freelance rumah. Seluruh teks sudah saya tulis—mulai dari persyaratan usia 18+, detail bayaran per pekerjaan (250–300 rb), sampai daftar platform seperti YUP 280k, AKULAKU 250k, dan sebagainya—tinggal Anda tata agar terbaca jelas dan menarik.

Gaya visual yang saya inginkan sederhana dan profesional: warna tidak perlu heboh, cukup bersih, tegas, dan terpercaya. Saya juga akan menyediakan satu gambar khusus yang harus dimasukkan; tidak ada logo lain.

Ringkasnya, hasil yang saya butuhkan:
• Desain poster ukuran A4 (potrait maupun landscape silakan pilih yang paling pas).  
• Skema warna simpel, profesional.  
• Seluruh teks asli dimasukkan tanpa perubahan, termasuk kontak Telegram/WhatsApp.  
• Satu gambar khusus terintegrasi secara proporsional.  
• File akhir dalam PDF siap cetak serta versi PNG resolusi tinggi.

Mohon sertakan portofolio desain poster sejenis agar saya bisa cepat memutuskan.

title: Realistic Comic Storyboard ASAP -- 2
desc:
I’m gearing up for a new animated project and I need an experienced storyboard artist who can translate my script into a clear, realistic comic-style storyboard right away. The emphasis is on cinematic framing, believable anatomy, and panel-to-panel flow that an animation team can pick up without extra clarification.

Here’s what I’m expecting:  
• A full storyboard covering the entire script, delivered as layered PSD (or comparable) files plus a clean PDF for review.  
• Consistent, realistic character proportions and environments—think live-action blocking, not exaggerated cartoon angles.  
• Dynamic camera movement notes, shot descriptions, and simple arrows so timing is obvious for the editors.  
• Swift turnaround: first draft within a few days, polished version immediately after feedback—speed matters.

If this first phase goes smoothly I’ll likely roll the same artist into rough animatics and, later, 2D animation passes, so clarity and organization in your boards will be key. Please share samples of previous realistic storyboards and outline how fast you can hit the ground running.

title: YouTube Animated Biography Documentary
desc:
I have a fully written script for a 10–15 minute YouTube documentary that tells a compelling biography, and I want it brought to life with the illustrated-character approach you see on Wallace Animation and Serious History. The piece will rely entirely on original 2D cut-out art rather than stock footage, so I need someone comfortable designing simple characters, animating their movements and expressions, and weaving in maps, diagrams, camera pans, zooms, and smooth scene transitions to keep viewers engaged from start to finish.

You’ll receive the voice-over, timing references, and a style guide that clarifies colour palette and illustrative tone. From there, I’m counting on you to handle the complete motion-graphics workflow in After Effects (or comparable software), add subtle sound design where it supports the visuals, and deliver a polished 1080p (or higher) master ready for upload.

Deliverables
• Illustrated assets and layered project files  
• Fully animated video synced to the supplied narration  
• One round of revision for pacing, visual clarity, and factual accuracy  
• Final MP4 plus an exported project archive for future edits

If you’re excited to craft a biography that feels as instantly watchable as the linked examples, let’s discuss your approach and timeline.
